falafel-fritters-bowl-with-cucumbers-and.name: Falafel Fritters Bowl With Cucumbers And Yogurt Sauce

ingredients.prep: plus 1 cup whole leaves with tender stems

ingredients.item: Persian cucumbers or  0.5 english hothouse cucumber

instructions: Mix chickpeas, egg, cornstarch, cumin, ¼ cup chopped parsley, and ¼ cup yogurt in a large bowl. Generously season with salt and pepper.
Finely chop half of onion and measure out ¼ cup. Add to bowl with chickpea mixture. Reserve other half for later.

Using a potato masher, mash mixture until you’ve broken up almost all of the chickpeas and a thick, coarse paste forms. Some of the chickpeas can be left in larger pieces with a few left whole, but you want everything more or less mashed up.
→  Please give the potato masher the love it deserves

Using your hands, a scoop, or a measuring cup, portion mixture into 16 more-or-less even balls (each ball should be a scant ¼ cup; don’t fill the measuring cup up all the way!). Roll each ball gently between your palms and transfer to a rimmed baking sheet or plate.
Press down on balls with your palm to flatten to a ½"-thick patty. If mixture is super sticky and coats your hands, dampen your hands with a bit of cold water and try again.

Heat a large skillet (preferably cast iron) over medium-high. Add 3 Tbsp. oil and swirl skillet to coat. When oil is hot, add half of fritters, spacing evenly apart, and press down on top of each with a spatula to flatten into discs. Be careful as you do this because mixture is wet and may splatter.

Cook fritters until dark golden brown and crisp on first side, 3–5 minutes. If you’re dealing with annoying oil splatter, reduce heat to medium. Slide a thin metal spatula underneath fritters and gently turn over.
Cook fritters on second side until browned and crisp, 3–5 minutes. Transfer fritters to a plate or wire rack (if you have one).
Repeat cooking process with 3 Tbsp. oil and remaining fritters.

Stir remaining ½ cup yogurt and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
→  We're just really into yogurt sauce

Thinly slice remaining red onion. Transfer to a large bowl, then add cucumbers and remaining 1 cup parsley, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, and 2 Tbsp. oil. Season with salt and pepper, then toss gently to combine.
Divide cucumber mixture and fritters among bowls. Spoon yogurt sauce alongside and serve with lemon wedges.

farfalle-with-tomato-sauce-and-bacon-ste.name: Farfalle With Tomato Sauce And Bacon Step By Step
farfalle-with-tomato-sauce-and-bacon-ste.original_name: Farfalle con salsa de tomate y panceta paso a paso

ingredients.item: 150 g de panceta o bacon en tiras
400 g de tomates en lata triturados o frescos pelados
3  cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: Put a big pot with water and come and get some water. Filling dough as instructed by the package till the dente. Reserve a cup of cooking water before you run.
Meanwhile, it heats up a large frying pan with olive oil and adds the pancet into strips. Cooking at medium-high heat 5- 6 minutes till golden and slightly crispy. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, put down the fire and pat the onion for 5 minutes till clear. Add garlic and cook another minute.
Incorpora el tomate triturado, mezcla y cocina 12-15 minutos a fuego medio, removiendo de vez en cuando, hasta que la salsa espese y pierda acidez. Ajusta de sal y pimienta.
Add the pancette back to the sauce. Mix well and, if the salsa is very thick, add some of the reserved water from the dough.
Incorporates the baked pasta into the frying pan and removes until well covered with salsa.
Sirve caliente, espolvoreando parmesano rallado y, si lo prefieres, unas hojas de albahaca fresca.

fasting-chocolate-sauce-without-sugar-ar.name: Fasting Chocolate Sauce Without Sugar
instructions: Without sugar and cream, you must use coconut milk.
You'll find on the supermarket shelves in cans, which is something as cream.
Add all the interredients into a pot over very low heat and mix gently until they melt.
Enjoy the delicate chocolate sauce without sugar in vegan sweets, or with sauces as in the Recipe below.

fasting-cornmeal-pie-argiro.name: Fasting Cornmeal Pie

ingredients.item: 2 flushed beans or other bottled leguminous vegetarians
2 flushed beans or other bottled leguminous vegetarians

We Shake Him With Our Hands And Use Him Like Minced Meat.
Boil the water in a pot and as soon as it boils, add 2 tabletspoons of salt.
Sprinkle the corn and stir in low heat let it wind and thinken the mixture, become like chewed potatoes.
After the cream thinks, remove from heat, add the butter and cover until we use it.
Heat the oil in a large deep pan.
Add the minced meat and add the onion, garlic and peppers.
Add salt and pepper.
Add the tomatoes, broken with a spoon, Beans and sparks.
Lower the heat and simmer with the pot covered for 10 minutes until the sauce almost drinks.
Preheat the evening to 180-2003
We butter fireproof oval or square vessel.
We make a layer, about 2 cup of corn cream, pour all the finished meat into a layerer and cover with the rest of the corn purée.
Sprinkle with the cheese and baking for about 35 minutes until it makes a light crust.
Allow to stand for 15 minutes and serve with salad.

fasting-merenda-without-sugar-argiro.name: Fasting Merenda Without Sugar
instructions: Fine chop the chocolate first with a knife.
Add the coconut butter, honey and coconut cream to a pot with a dick base.
The fire must be very low.
Allow the ingredients to melt, stringing from time to time with a spoon.
When they melt, we withdraw the vessel from the fire.
Allow the mixture to cool.
Place it in a jar and keep it in the refrigerator for 10 days.
Enjoy the homemade portion with your breakfast as a bread grind, cakes, cookies and what you like.

fava-bean-and-pea-salad-with-poppy-seed-.name: Fava Bean And Pea Salad With Poppy Seed Dressing

ingredients.item: Shelled fava beans (from about 2 lb. pods) or frozen fava beans
Shelled fresh peas (from about 2 lb. pods) or frozen peas

instructions: If using fresh fava beans, cook in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 4 minutes. Using a sieve, transfer to a colander set in a bowl of ice water. Drain well and peel; place in a medium bowl. (If using frozen fava beans, cook 2 minutes; do not peel.)

Return water in saucepan to a boil; add peas and cook until tender, about 2 minutes. Drain; transfer to colander in ice water. Drain and add to bowl with fava beans. (If using frozen peas, cook 30 seconds.)

Whisk sour cream, goat cheese, buttermilk, and lemon juice in a medium bowl, thinning with more buttermilk as needed, until pourable; season with salt and pepper. Arrange lettuce and pea shoots on a platter, top with fava beans and peas, drizzle with dressing, and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
DO AHEAD: Fava beans and peas can be cooked 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

fiesta-pinwheels.name: Fiesta Pinwheels
instructions: Beat cream cheese, sour cream, picante sauce, taco seasoning, and garlic powder together in a small bowl until smooth; stir in Cheddar cheese, olives, and chiles.
Spread about ½ cup cream cheese mixture onto each tortilla; roll each like a jelly roll. Wrap rolls in plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 2 hours to overnight. Cut into 1-inch slices.

fig-preserves.name: Fig Preserves
instructions: Place figs in a large bowl; sprinkle baking soda over figs. Carefully cover figs with boiling water and soak for 1 hour. Drain figs and rinse thoroughly with cold water.
Combine sugar and 4 cups of water in a large Dutch oven; bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add figs and lemon slices to syrup and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.

Spoon figs into hot, sterilized jars and spoon syrup over figs, leaving ½ inch of head space. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and let rest, several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area for up to 1 year.

fish-burger-recipe-with-coleslaw-comeder.name: Fish Burger Recipe With Coleslaw
fish-burger-recipe-with-coleslaw-comeder.original_name: Receta de hamburguesa de pescado con coleslaw

ingredients.item: 250 g de pescado blanco (merluza, bacalao o tilapia)
A little more mayonnaise to anoint

instructions: Fold the fish with a knife or process it quickly, leaving some texture. Meg with egg, frosted bread, mustard, garlic, salt and pepper.
It forms two burgers of the same size and refrigerates them 10 minutes to get them to body.
Meanwhile, mix cabbage, carrot, mayonnaise, vinegar, sugar, salt and pepper into a bowl. Book the coleslaw in the refrigerator.
In a frying pan, heat up some oil and cook the burgers 4-5 minutes by and frying till they are golden and cooked inside.
Tuesta ligeramente los panes si quieres. Unta la base con un poco de mayonesa, coloca el coleslaw, la hamburguesa y cierra con la otra mitad del pan.

fish-casserole-recipe-comedera.name: Fish Casserole Recipe

ingredients.item: Aceitunas verdes y negras al gusto

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, calentando un cacerola con un poco de aceite.
Later, you will add onion, garlic, anchovian steaks, cumin, parrot and bay leaf. You're gonna leap for about 5 minutes.
Now, it incorporates tuna, sardines, expert tomato, minced tomato and preserved peppers. Mix and cook for another 5 minutes till everything's integrated.
Finally, add black and green olives to taste and parsley. Mix and let cook for 15 minutes with low heat.
Apaga y deja reposar.
Company with rice or dough.

fish-fillet-recipe-in-tamarind-sauce-com.name: Fish Fillet Recipe In Tamarind Sauce
fish-fillet-recipe-in-tamarind-sauce-com.original_name: Receta de filete de pescado en salsa de tamarindo
instructions: Swallow fish steaks and baits with the juice of 2 lemons. Reserve.
In a frying pan with medium heat, add a tablespoon of oil and let the onion and garlic golden.
Cuando la cebolla comience a transparentar, agregar el concentrado de tamarindo, y la taza de agua.
Revuelve bien y deja cocinar durante 1 minuto.
Then add lemon juice and sugar and salt. Swallow well and let them cook at medium heat for 10 minutes until the desired consistency is achieved.
Meanwhile, in another frying pan with medium high heat, add olive oil and fry fish to golden.
To serve, put the fish into the plate and drink with plenty of salsa.
You can come with them with some rice or some frying jug.

instructions: 1. Boiled fish's skin and bristle; extract and remove them.
2. Wash the parley, extract and veccedil;ok fine shore.
3. Ayçiçheat the oil in the pot.
4.  Unu ilave edin.

fish-from-the-garden-with-coriander-mayo.name: Fish From The Garden With Coriander Mayonnaise
fish-from-the-garden-with-coriander-mayo.original_name: Peixinhos da horta com maionese de coentros
instructions: Get the green beans, remove the ends, and cut into pieces of 5 to 6 cm.
In a bowl, pour beer, water and egg. Add the flour and yeast sifted and incorporate very well with a wire rod, until it is creamy and without clumps.

Pass the green beans through the previous preparation and fry in abundant hot oil. Remove, drain well and season with salt and pepper. Serve with a little mayonnaise, previously mixed with chopped coriander.

flatbread-pastry-with-lots-of-cheese-lez.name: Flatbread Pastry With Lots Of Cheese

ingredients.item: 1 tea cup grated fresh cheese Home

instructions: 1. Mix grated cheeses in a bowl for the inner mortar.
2. Softeners are divided into a kitchen countertop or two.
3. Two slices of rust in the middle of each Yufka and broadcast from cheeses that you mix.
4. Fold the Yufka in the dörde to achieve square.
5. Repeat the same process until all material is finished.
6. Remove the olive oil from the rivers and fry in a nonstick pan.
7. Serve hot.

flower-ravioli-with-lemon-and-herb-ricot.name: Flower Ravioli With Lemon And Herb Ricotta

ingredients.item: Edible flowers in a variety of colors
Basil pesto or sauce of choice

instructions: Make the pasta dough: In a medium bowl, whisk together the 00 flour and salt. Pour the flour mixture onto a clean surface and form a well in the center.
In the same medium bowl, combine the eggs, egg yolks, and olive oil. Whisk rapidly until fully combined, about 2 minutes.

Pour the egg mixture into the well of the flour mixture and use a fork to pull the dough together, working the egg mixture in a circular motion while slowly incorporating the flour around the edges of the well. Once all of the flour has been incorporated, knead the dough for 8 minutes, until smooth and elastic. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
After the dough has rested, cut it into 4 equal portions. Use a pasta sheeter to roll the dough out, one portion at a time, starting at the widest setting and working to setting 5.
Press the edible flowers onto one half of the dough, then fold the other half of the dough over to cover the flowers. Press down gently on the dough to seal the flowers in.
Roll the dough back through the pasta sheeter, starting at setting number 3 and going to setting number 7.

Make the herb and lemon ricotta filling: In the bowl of a food processor, combine the ricotta, lemon zest, salt, and Parmesan cheese. Process for 2 minutes, until very creamy. Transfer the ricotta mixture to a large bowl and fold in the chives, parsley, and basil. Transfer the filling to a large piping bag fitted with a round tip and refrigerate until ready to use.

Assemble the ravioli: On a lightly floured surface, lay out the pasta dough. Leaving a 1-inch border at the bottom of the dough, pipe 1 teaspoon dollops of the ricotta filling along the bottom half of the pasta, spacing 1 inch apart.

Using a pastry brush, wet the bottom border of the pasta lightly with water. Fold the top half of the dough over the filling and seal along the bottom border. Using a ravioli cutter, cut the pasta into squares, leaving a ½-inch border from the filling on all sides.
Cooking the ravioli: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the ravioli and cook for 3 minutes, until al dente. Drain pasta water.
Serve with basil pesto or your preferred sauce.
Enjoy!

fluffy-buns-argiro.name: Fluffy Buns
instructions: Crush the yeast with the Fingers in a medium bowl. Add 1 teaspoon of the total mountain of sugar and 200 g of water. Mix with a sponge until the yeast dissolves.
Add 150 g of the total flower and mix well until a morridge is formed.
Cover the bowl with membrane and place the dough in a lukewarm, extended oven for about 20 minutes, until it is activated and puffed up.
Keep 25 g of butter for the end of the dough and melt the remaining 100 g over low heat. Remove from heat and allow a few minutes to drop.
In a mortar or mold, beat the music and the music with some of the sugar in the retrieve until they become powder.
We check that Melted butter does not burn and add the sugar, zest, Juice and both eggs. Mix well with wire until homogenized.
In the mixer's bowl, add the remaining flower (500 g), salt, machete and machete. Mix lightly with a sponge and create a pothole in the center.
Add the liquid materials (butter, eggs, juice) as well as the puffed dough. Bake with the Hook at low speed for 2 minutes until the flower is incorporated.
Then increase to medium speed and continue the dough for 6–8 minutes, until the dough becomes elastic and "like gum". If necessary, clear the bowl walls with a soft spatula.
At the end of the dough, and when the mixer works, gradually add the 25 g butter we kept into small pieces.

With buttery hands, transfer the soft and fluffy dough into a large bowl, placing it with the compact downwards. Cover with membrane and place in a warm place for about 1 hour and 20 minutes, until double in volume.

four-cheese-stuffed-jalapenos.name: Four Cheese Stuffed Jalapeños
instructions: Place a steamer insert into a saucepan and fill with water to just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring water to a boil. Add jalapeño peppers, cover, and steam until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Mix cream cheese with Parmesan, Cheddar, and feta cheeses, garlic, salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, chili powder, and garlic powder in a bowl.
Arrange jalapeño peppers on the prepared baking sheet. Spoon cheese mixture into each pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and bubbling, about 10 minutes.

freezer-prep-protein-packed-chili.name: Freezer-prep Protein Packed Chili
instructions: In a large pot, heat the oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until translucent. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring occasionally. Transfer to a slow cooker.

Add the black beans, kidney beans, chickpeas, corn, diced tomatoes, and tomato paste to the slow cooker. Season with the chili powder, cumin, paprika, cayenne, coriander, salt, honey, vegetable stock, and lentils.
Stir and slow cook on high for 4 hours or on low for 6 hours, until the lentils have softened.
Enjoy right away or freeze up to 6 months in an airtight container. Defrost in the refrigerator and reheat when ready to eat. Serve with shredded cheese, sour cream, and sliced scallions.
Enjoy!

fresh-blueberry-brioche.name: Fresh Blueberry Brioche
instructions: Place fresh blueberries on a plate and freeze in a single layer. (Do not use frozen blueberries, as they are too watery.)

Slightly warm milk and pour into bowl of a stand mixer fitted with dough hook attachment. Add yeast and whisk by hand to combine. Add all-purpose flour, bread flour, 2 1/2 tbsp sugar, salt, eggs, and egg yolk to bowl. Mix on low speed until dough comes together, 1-2 minutes.
Increase mixer speed to medium-low and work dough for 6 minutes. Pause every minute to push dough back down and off the hook until it pulls off the bowl sides and looks like a strong bread dough.

Reduce mixer speed to low and slowly add butter, a little at a time, over the course of 2 minutes (pausing after 1 minute to scrape down bowl and hook). When butter begins to blend in, increase mixer speed to medium-high to fully incorporate butter and bring the dough back together, 5-6 minutes longer.

Place dough on a lightly floured work surface and press into a 16" x 10" rectangle with a short side nearest you; distribute blueberries and 2 tbsp sugar along the top edge and gently roll down, toward you, into a log.
Place on a greased baking sheet, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or preferably overnight.
Grease a 9" x 5" loaf pan. Reshape dough by pressing it into a 12" x 6" rectangle with a short side nearest you. Sprinkle with remaining 2 tbsp sugar and tightly roll down toward you.
Place into greased loaf pan, loosely wrap in plastic, and allow to rise in a warm place until more than doubled in size, about 3 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Carefully brush dough with Egg Wash, making sure egg doesn't pool around the edges. Liberally sprinkle with sugar. Bake until golden, 40-45 minutes. Allow to cool for about 15 minutes in the pan. Then transfer to a cooling rack.

fresh-pear-cake.name: Fresh Pear Cake
instructions: Combine pears and sugar in a large bowl; let stand for one hour.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Generously spray a 10-inch Bundt pan with non-stick cooking spray.
Beat egg whites until combined; mix in oil, chopped pecans, and pear mixture.
Mix flour, salt, baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, and cloves together; stir into pear mixture. Pour cake batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 1 hour and 10 minutes. Let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
Invert carefully onto a serving plate or rack and let cool completely.

fresh-tomato-cucumber-and-alfalfa-sprout.name: Fresh Tomato, Cucumber And Alfalfa Sprouts Salad
fresh-tomato-cucumber-and-alfalfa-sprout.original_name: Ensalada fresca de tomate, pepino y brotes de alfalfa

ingredients.item: 2  tomates maduros (firmes y con buen sabor)
Optional: a few drops of soft vinegar or lemon

instructions: Cut the tomato. Wash and cut them into thick cuts or cuts. Avoid fine cutting: tomato should maintain structure and release juice without disposal.
Prepare the cucumber. Hair only partially, leaving some skin. Cut them into slices or thin moons but with body.
Rig up the salad. Put tomato and cucumber into a large bowl. Add the elphis sprouts above, without pressure.
Fairy at the end. First room, wait a few seconds and add the oil. If you wear vinegar or lemon, let's have little.
Mezcla con cuidado. Da un par de vueltas suaves y sirve de inmediato.

fried-milk-traditional-recipe-comedera.name: Fried Milk, Traditional Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  a cucharadita cafetera de extracto de vainilla

instructions: The first step to preparing a recipe for frying milk is to have milk. One of the flavors we'll use will be the lemon skin. Then we have to wash this fruit well and remove his skin with the help of a vegetable peller. Special attention should be paid to withdrawing only the green or yellow part of the shell and as little as possible from the white part under the skin, as it has a bitter taste.

Then we will heat up the liquid milk into a saucer or pot (reserve a few cups of this ingredient for later). To flavour it, we will add the skin of the lemon and the vanilla and cinnamon. Then let's hope that milk increases its temperature and as soon as it's nearly broken to boil, we'll turn it off. We'll cover up the pot soon and put them back and let them rest for half an hour. Thus, milk will become an infusion.

When the rest time of milk is complete, remove the cinnamon branch and skin from the lemon. Reheat her up with as low a fire as possible. That will take more time but it's essential for a better result. While it's hot, we'll add the sugar and dissolve it. To this end, we will move milk with the help of a kitchen spoon or better, a mixer.

While the milk gets hot, we get back the additional amount of this ingredient we had booked. We'll use it to dissolve the starch little by little, to make sure that it completely dissolve and that there's no clumps left.

Once Maicena's completely dissolved, we'll mix this milk with the rest. Remember that the fire has to be to a minimum. That's important because it'll get the milk thickened up little by little. The milk gets hot and we'll keep stirring. We will pay special attention to how the mixture will not stick to the bottom of the pot.
The idea is to continue to cook and move milk till it's nearly curved. Instead she'll get really thick and creamy.

Get a wide or spacious container with walls. Reg it up so dessert doesn't stick. Decide if you prefer to use oil or butter (best if it's a little ground but never hot). The ideal thing is that it's mold to be broad enough so that when we put up with the fluid, we end up with more or less a pair of fingers thick.
Cover the container with its cover or its defect with a plastic film. Keep it in the refrigerator for several hours. In fact, if you can leave him for an entire night, you'll have better frying milk.
Antes de sacar la mezcla del refrigerador, bate un huevo en un bol.  Al lado, acomoda un plato con la harina.
Take the curved milk out of the cold and very carefully, cut it into medium rectangles. The mixture should be tipped without problems from your container as we have previously been ingested.
Warm a frying pan with a good jet of oil to fry the milk rectangles. Before you put them into hot oil, pass every rectangle through the beaten egg and later through the flour to bounce them.
Fry every rectangle from both sides, till it takes a golden color. When you get them out of the oil, put them onto a plate covered with an absorbing paper sheet to remove excess fat.
Next up, place a plate with a mixture of powder sugar and cinnamon powder. Each rectangle of fried milk passes through this mixture for a final touch of flavour and texture.

fried-tomato-sauce-comedera.name: Fried Tomato Sauce
instructions: El primer paso es quitarle la piel a los tomates. Esto es muy sencillo.
Hazle un corte en forma de cruz a los tomates por la parte de abajo. Con que sea un corte superficial es suficiente.
Put the tomatoes into a pot with boiling water for 1 minute, no more.
Take them out of the pot and put them under cold water jet.
Now, just as you cut the cross cut, you'll see that the skin's clear. Then just put them all down and get rid of that skin.
Peel the tomatoes into medium pieces and pass them through a shredder till they get as consistent as you wish.
Calienta a fuego medio una olla con un chorro de aceite de oliva.
Drop the tomatoes, a pint of salt and an even smaller pint of sugar.
Remueve bien durante unos minutos.
Baja el fuego y tapa la olla.
Deja que se cocine la salsa durante unos 40 minutos removiendo de vez en cuando.
Check the salt for more.
If you wish for a more condensed salsa, let them cook with an extra few minutes with the padded pot.
Apaga el fuego y deja que reposa tu deliciosa salsa de tomates fritos.

frittata-with-chard-and-chorizo.name: Frittata With Chard And Chorizo

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely chopped

instructions: Heat broiler. Whisk eggs in a large bowl, then whisk in cheese and herbs; season with salt and pepper.
Cook chorizo in a 10” broilerproof skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium heat, stirring often, until browned and crisp, about 3 minutes. Transfer to plate.

Heat oil in same skillet; add onion, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until beginning to soften, about 1 minute. Add potatoes and cook, tossing occasionally, until just softened, about 5 minutes.

Add chard and cook, stirring often, until chard is wilted; season with salt and pepper. Mix in chorizo. Pour in egg mixture, tilting skillet to evenly distribute. Cook, undisturbed, 2 minutes, then transfer to oven and broil until egg is cooked through and starting to brown, about 5 minutes. Run a heatproof spatula around edges of frittata to loosen, then slide onto a plate; serve in wedges.

frozen-blueberry-cake.name: Frozen Blueberry Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a tube pan.

Puree blueberries in a food processor until smooth. Add eggs, sugar, oil, and vanilla extract and mix well. Mix in flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Stir in chocolate chips. Pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes, then invert and remove from the pan. Cool completely.

frozen-rosalita.name: Frozen Rosalita

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Pour salt onto a small plate. Rub half of rim of 2 wine glasses or tumblers with lime wedge. Gently dip rims in salt, turning slowly to coat.
Combine tequila, lime juice, amaro, and agave in jar. Secure lid and shake to combine. Freeze until ice-cold but not solid, at least 1 hour and up to 3 hours.

Transfer cocktail to a blender and add 1½ cups ice. Purée on high speed until thick and smooth. (On a hot day you may need to blend in a few more ice cubes to thicken, but keep in mind that the more you add, the more diluted the drink will be.)
Divide cocktail between prepared glasses.

fruit-bake.name: Fruit Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.

Arrange the peaches, pears, rhubarb, raisins, and papaya or mango in the prepared pan. In a medium bowl, combine the baking mix, brown sugar and margarine. Stir until mixture has a crumbly texture. Sprinkle evenly over fruit.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is golden brown, 35 to 45 minutes.

fufu.name: Fufu
instructions: The night before, or at least 4 hours prior to cooking, freeze one 1-lb. small cassava, peeled, woody center removed, cubed; this will make blending a whole lot easier once it’s thawed.

When ready to cook, remove cassava from freezer and thaw at room temperature 15 minutes. In a high- speed blender, combine cassava, 2 green plantains, peeled, cubed, boiled, and 2 cups water. Blend on high speed until you have a smooth purée; it should resemble a thick pancake batter. Pour the blended mixture into a large heavy-bottomed pot, stir in 2 tsp. kosher salt, and set over medium heat. With a banku ta or wooden spatula, stir mixture continuously until dough is completely silky, up to 20 minutes. Once this consistency is reached, clean your wooden spatula of any built- up fufu and wet it. With the handle of the wet spoon, poke little holes down to bottom of pot and pour 1 tsp. water in each hole. Reduce heat to medium- low, place lid over pot, and steam fufu until it is smooth, sticky, and pliable, 15–20 minutes. Stir once more.

Dampen a small bowl with water. Scoop a portion of fufu the size of an orange into bowl and swirl it around using your fingers until fufu comes together into a smooth ball. Transfer to a plate and repeat with remaining fufu. Serve warm with stews and soups.

funfetti-cake.name: Funfetti Cake
instructions: Prepare cake: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat 3 (8-inch) round cake pans with baking spray with flour. Line the bottom of each cake pan with a piece of parchment paper cut to fit the bottom.

Beat white sugar and butter together in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment at medium speed until mixture is light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add eggs, one at a time, beating on low speed until combined.

Whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl. Add flour mixture to butter mixture in 3 additions, alternating with milk, beginning and ending with flour mixture. Beat on low speed until blended after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract and sprinkles on low speed, about 20 seconds.
Divide batter evenly among prepared pans, about 2 cups per pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a wooden pick inserted in center comes out clean, 25 to 28 minutes. Let cool in pans for 10 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack and let cool completely, about 30 minutes.

Prepare the frosting: Beat butter in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment at medium speed until creamy, about 2 minutes. Add powdered sugar, salt, and vanilla. Beat at low speed until combined, about 30 seconds. Beat in sour cream. Increase speed to high and beat until fluffy, scraping down sides as needed, 1 1/2 to 2 minutes. Stir in sprinkles.

Place 1 cake layer on a plate; spread with about 3/4 cup frosting. Repeat cake and frosting layers one more time. Top with remaining cake layer. Spread remaining frosting over top and sides of cake. Garnish with more sprinkles, if desired. Store cake loosely covered in the refrigerator. Recipe developed by Anna Theoktisto
